notes:
The game only runs when setting the launch parameters to (without quotes ofc):
"cd ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/FINAL\ FANTASY\ IX/; STEAM_COMPAT_DATA_PATH=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/377840/pfx ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Proton\ 3.16\/proton run x64/FF9.exe" 

Make sure you set the proton version number in this config to the one you are using! After that, it also has the same mouse/controller issues as Subnautica and others, making it uncontrollable. Tried esync, D3D11, etc. - no change. Hopefully will be fixed soon(-ish)!
title: FINAL FANTASY IX

notes: Runs perfectly with "cd ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/FINAL\ FANTASY\ IX/; STEAM_COMPAT_DATA_PATH=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/377840/pfx ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Proton\ 3.7\/proton run x64/FF9.exe" as a launch parameter. NOTE: You HAVE to use Proton 3.7 to get Steam and Xbox controllers working! Apparently there's a bug in version 3.16 that makes the game not work with them. I've played a little over 10  hours on 3.7-8 with the Steam controller with zero problems.
title: FINAL FANTASY IX

notes: Runs perfectly with "cd ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/FINAL\ FANTASY\ IX/;STEAM_COMPAT_DATA_PATH=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/377840/pfx ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Proton\ 3.7\/proton run x64/FF9.exe"
title: FINAL FANTASY IX

notes:
Launch Options may be different if you install the game on another hard disk, if its on your main hard drive just ignore that, if not you need to tune the paths like this: "cd /mnt/7315ff37-e228-40e8-8466-a5f6d2a4e0e6/SteamLibrary/steamapps/common/FINAL FANTASY IX/; STEAM_COMPAT_DATA_PATH=/mnt/7315ff37-e228-40e8-8466-a5f6d2a4e0e6/SteamLibrary/steamapps/compatdata/377840/pfx /mnt/usb-WDC_WD10_EARS-00Y5B1_00efcc5e-0:0-part1/SteamLibrary/steamapps/common/Proton\ 3.7\/proton run x64/FF9.exe" 

This is an external USB Harddrive from WesternDigital. 
After that the game runs flawless! :)
title: FINAL FANTASY IX

notes:
I tried the fix proposed in previous report, and unfortunatly it didnt worked for me, i had to either disable d3d11 or use wine d3d11 to make it work, i dont have the knowledge to know why and how to do a proper solution for me the fix where :



1) add "cd ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/FINAL\ FANTASY\ IX/; STEAM_COMPAT_DATA_PATH=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/377840/pfx ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Proton\ 4.2/proton run x64/FF9.exe" to the launch option



2) use wine d3d11
title: FINAL FANTASY IX

notes: I tried with the latest version of proton and it worked(after adding the "cd ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/FINAL\ FANTASY\ IX/; STEAM_COMPAT_DATA_PATH=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/377840/pfx ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Proton\ 4.2/proton run x64/FF9.exe" ) but when I used a controller I got the "always walking left" bugged input. I changed to the  Proton Version forthe 3.7-8 and adapted the path to match it, since then it has been working perfectly with the controller, no extra tweaks needed.
title: FINAL FANTASY IX

notes: Add to lauch parameters this options cd ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/FINAL\ FANTASY\ IX/; STEAM_COMPAT_DATA_PATH=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/377840/pfx ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Proton\ 4.2/proton run x64/FF9.exe
title: FINAL FANTASY IX

gpu: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 with Max-Q Design
notes: With protonfixes set up, works perfectly out of the box. Presumably will work perfectly with proton versions newer than 3.7-8 as well, but since it's working literally perfectly with 3.7-8, I haven't seen a reason to try anything else.
title: FINAL FANTASY IX

notes:
When using multiple locations

I have 2 paths one to proton and one to steam libary.

[PROTON] = ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common
[STEAMLIB] = /media/data/SteamLibrary/

cd [STEAMLIB]/steamapps/common/FINAL\ FANTASY\ IX/; STEAM_COMPAT_DATA_PATH=[STEAMLIB]/steamapps/compatdata/377840/pfx [PROTON]/Proton\ 4.2/proton run x64/FF9.exe
title: FINAL FANTASY IX

notes: I used the launch option suggested by others with a few different versions of proton, just make sure you modify it to specific version you are using.  I also had no problem running the High Resolution texture mod from Fraggoso.  Finished game to completion, no problems.
title: FINAL FANTASY IX

notes: Like others said, you should set your launch option to "cd ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/FINAL\ FANTASY\ IX/; STEAM_COMPAT_DATA_PATH=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/377840/pfx ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Proton\ 4.11/proton run x64/FF9.exe", But you need to set the Proton folder to your actual installed Version.
title: FINAL FANTASY IX

notes: Here's a completely agnostic way to set the launcher options: set -- %command%; "${@:1:2}" x64/FF9.exe "${@:4}"
title: FINAL FANTASY IX
